service.description: YOLOX-based person detection with bounding box annotation. Subscribes to camera frames, runs inference, draws bounding boxes, and publishes annotated images plus detection results.

subscribe.name: input
subscribe.description: JPEG image frames from camera component

publish.name: annotated
publish.description: Annotated images with bounding boxes drawn around detected persons

publish.name: detections
publish.description: Detection results as JSON array with class, confidence, and bbox

input_component.description: Name of the camera component to subscribe to

model_path.description: Path to YOLOX model file (.hef for Hailo, .onnx for ONNX Runtime)

classes.description: Object classes to detect and report

draw_boxes.description: Draw bounding boxes on annotated output

draw_labels.description: Draw class labels and confidence on bounding boxes

box_color.description: Bounding box color in hex format

box_thickness.description: Bounding box line thickness in pixels
